text:
What Trump has done to America's children:

- US lost measles elimination status. Children have died.
- Gutted the childhood vaccine schedule, removing 6 vaccines
- His HHS Secretary called folic acid (prevents spina bifida) "insanity"
- Cancelled billions in cancer research, including pediatric trials
- Separated 5,400+ children from their families at the border

These are not political opinions. These are things that happened to children. All sourced.
